identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a 'Liquid Steel' executive operating system that feels controlled, decisive, and infrastructure-grade. No gamification, no excessive brightness.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Liquid Steel = FinTech Precision + Industrial Strength
Emotion First: The user 'Andre' feels calm, powerful, and in control.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Typography and spacing frame the data.
Contrast: Deep dark backgrounds (#0F1720) vs. Sharp Orange Accents (#FF6A00).

headings.usage: Page titles, card headers, section titles

metrics.usage: KPIs, financial data, code snippets, IDs

visual_enhancers.shadows: none (flat, precision look) or very subtle ambient for float

navigation.sidebar: Fixed left, width 280px, grouped by Intelligence, Execution, Systems, Governance
navigation.topbar: Height 64px, Logo left, Status center, User right

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6A00] hover:bg-[#E65E00] text-white font-semibold rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-[#141C26] border border-[#243140] text-[#F4F7FA] hover:bg-[#1E293B] rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors duration-200
buttons.ghost: text-[#9FB0C3] hover:text-[#F4F7FA] hover:bg-[#1E293B] rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 transition-colors duration-200

cards.default: bg-[#141C26] border border-[#243140] rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col gap-4
cards.metric: bg-[#141C26] border border-[#243140] rounded-lg p-5 flex flex-col justify-between h-full

inputs.default: bg-[#0F1720] border border-[#243140] text-[#F4F7FA] placeholder-[#64748B] rounded-md px-3 py-2 focus:border-[#FF6A00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF6A00] focus:outline-none transition-all duration-200

badges.default: bg-[#1E293B] text-[#9FB0C3] px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
badges.alert: bg-[#FF6A00]/10 text-[#FF6A00] border border-[#FF6A00]/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

login.description: Minimalist, secure login. Liquid Steel theme. Logo + Credential fields + 'Secure Environment' badge.

executive_overview.description: The command center. Health Strip (top), 'What Needs Attention' (cards), Financial Snapshot (charts), Intelligence Pulse.

revenue_module.description: Deep dive into pipeline, concentration, and churn. Dense data tables and trend lines.

integrations.description: Grid of connected tools. Slide-out panel for details. Status indicators are critical.

alerts.description: Prioritized list of actions. Critical (Orange), Moderate, Info. Clear CTAs.

automations.description: IF/THEN builder interface. Visual logic flow. Controlled complexity.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use generic gradients. Use solid colors and subtle borders.
DO NOT use 'Inter' for Headings. Use 'Sora'.
Orange (#FF6A00) is for ACTIONS and ALERTS only. Do not use it for decoration.
Always use 'JetBrains Mono' for numbers, currency, and percentages.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
Mobile: Bottom tab nav, swipeable cards.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-fidelity mockup. Focus on the 'Liquid Steel' aesthetic. It should look like a tool for a CFO or COO—serious, precise, and expensive. Avoid whitespace overload; prefer dense, structured information hierarchy.
